{{Quote|No, I won't throw away my Torshkin M-2 intergyrons. I'll figure out some way to use them to make this ship even better! What do you mean "better than what?" Izzat some kind of crack?|Korkeal Hai|<ref name="Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters (Second Edition)">[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters'', Second Edition]]</ref>}}
'''Korkeal Hai''' was a hyperkinetic [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who loved tinkering with her [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the modified [[Gymsnor-3 light freighter/Legends|Gymsnor-3 freighter]] called the ''[[Riff-Raff]]''.

==Biography==
She spent her early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] in the [[Shesharile system/Legends|Shesharile system]] constructing a [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] from spare parts with the help of an old high-grade [[Computer/Legends|computer]] from the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. She installed the computer in her [[Riff-Raff|ship]], and it constantly nagged her about her ship's disarray.<ref name="GG6-1" />

==Personality and traits==
Korkeal was a slender [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]], with failing [[Eye/Legends|eyesight]] that she corrected with archaic [[spectacles]] instead of corrective medicine. She never tired of trying new combinations of parts and she hoarded piles of machinery throughout her ship.<ref name="GG6-1" />
